title: Gravity Artifacts
description: Gravity Artifacts is a Fabric mod that adds the Gravity Glove, Gravity Bracelet, Gravity Ore, and Gravity Shards, bringing smooth mob control, flight, and gravity-based abilities to Minecraft.
body:
Gravity Artifacts is a Fabric mod for Minecraft that adds gravity-powered items with unique movement and mob-control abilities.

How to use
Gravity Glove
Hold the glove and aim at a mob, then hold right click to lift and move it smoothly through the air. The mob will follow the place you are aiming at, as if it has no gravity. This works on both passive mobs and hostile mobs. The glove can be used for up to 10 seconds, then it goes on a 5 second cooldown.

Gravity Bracelet
Hold the bracelet in your hand to gain the ability to fly. While holding it, right click to release a gravity pulse that sends nearby mobs flying away from you. This ability has a 10 second cooldown.

Gravity Ore
Gravity Ore can be found underground and must be mined with an iron pickaxe or better. Breaking it gives Gravity Shards, which are used to craft the gravity items.

Features
Smooth mob lifting and movement

Works on both peaceful and hostile mobs

Flight while holding the bracelet

Gravity pulse ability for crowd control!!

[Glove Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0373dfb9727781d68bda8fe71b7befd5dea002ab.png)


[Bracelet Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/651b5beda1e620f86ff93189ef3ee555d23cc8b7.png)

Requirements
Minecraft 

Fabric Loader

Fabric API
Discord:.kjs0
